mapper.select: SELECT * FROM products WHERE price BETWEEN #{minPrice} AND #{maxPrice} AND status = 1 ORDER BY price ASC
SELECT * FROM products WHERE price BETWEEN #{minPrice} AND #{maxPrice} AND status = 1 ORDER BY price ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO products (product_no, title, price, original_price, category_id, image_url, stock, sales, status, sort_order, description) VALUES
(#{product.productNo}, #{product.title}, #{product.price}, #{product.originalPrice}, #{product.categoryId}, #{product.imageUrl}, #{product.stock}, #{product.sales}, #{product.status}, #{product.sortOrder}, #{product.description})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE price BETWEEN #{minPrice} AND #{maxPrice} AND status = 1
